title: Using the board title within an automation
excerpt:
Hi, 
I connected a few boards together and I have few project boards where tasks are assigned to different owners and each owner has his own personal board. I made an automation that once assigned the task is created in …

posts.author: YanivG (Yaniv Goldberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I connected a few boards together and I have few project boards where tasks are assigned to different owners and each owner has his own personal board. I made an automation that once assigned the task is created in the personal board of the owner but I want the project name to be put in a designated column. As mentioned- the project name is the board’s title. Can I get the title somehow?

Thanks,
Yaniv

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YanivG - you can use the General Caster App to place the Board Name into a column on your board then send that along with your automation.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: YanivG (Yaniv Goldberger)
posts.cookedHtml: What about the workspace’s name? Can I get that?

posts.author: kzedmonds (kim)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - can I get more info on General Caster App? I am looking or a way to capture the board name and use it as an item in another board.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kzedmonds you can find more information and download here

Mark

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YanivG - I dont believe so.

I’ve added the Developer of the app here to confirm. @rob Is it possible to capture the Workspace Name?

Thanks,
Mark
